creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

While testing I have removed things which go in DOCSDIR from the PLIST 
and took advantage of the PORTDOCS Makefile variable for them. This 
simplifies the plist.

Can you approve the attached patch?

Thanks in advance!

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
